subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手親指で人差し指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". With both thumbs, pick up the far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、親指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指の糸を全て外します
左右の親指で人差し指手前の糸を押し下げ、小指向こうの糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near index-finger strings and pick up from below the far little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外します
左手中指の糸を右手で持ち、向こう側に半回転させて左手小指に移します
subtitle.en: Take the left middle-finger string with the right hand, twist it half a turn away, and transfer it to the left little finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手中指の糸を左手で持ち、向こう側に半回転させて右手小指に移します
subtitle.en: Take the right middle-finger string with the left hand, twist it half a turn away, and transfer it to the right little finger.

subtitle.ja: 両手人差し指の糸を静かに外します
左右の親指と人差し指の指先を合わせ、親指の糸を人差し指に移します。糸が指先から落ちないように中指で軽く挟みます
subtitle.en: Bring the tips of both thumbs and index fingers together, transfer the thumb strings to the index fingers, and lightly hold the strings with the middle fingers so they do not slip off.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を、小指手前と人差し指手前の糸に下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the near little-finger and near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指の糸が動かないように親指で押さえ、手を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Hold the index-finger strings in place with the thumbs, turn the hands away, and show the finished figure.
